allow: Bash(find . -maxdepth 2 -type f \\\( -iname "*.png" -o -iname "*.jpg" -o -iname "*.jpeg" -o -iname "*.svg" -o -iname "*.webp" -o -iname "*logo*" -o -iname "*banner*" \\\) 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -v ".git" | head -30)
Bash(ls -la webui/app/ && ls -la webui/public/ 2>/dev/null || echo "no public dir")
Bash(find webui/components -maxdepth 2 -type f -name "*.tsx" | grep -v node_modules | head -40)
Bash(ls -la webui/app/ && find webui -name "favicon*" -o -name "icon*" | grep -v node_modules)
Bash(mkdir -p webui/public && cp logo.png webui/public/logo.png && cp logo.png webui/app/icon.png && cp logo.png docs/static/img/logo.png)
